claims.claim: In experiments on a single GB10 node using Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct across three workload scenarios (60 requests each, concurrency 4), context clustering reduced p95 latency by 9.05–15.74% and prefill KV computed tokens by 96.69–97.95%, with no answer-quality degradation.

evidence_refs.quote: We present a local serving harness and experimental evaluation of context-aware request clustering for OpenAI-compatible LLM inference endpoints. The harness replays synthetic enterprise FAQ traces under two scheduling policies—fixed arrival-order microbatching and topic/prefix-based context clustering—against a vLLM endpoint with prefix caching enabled.
